Site credits

Built with Jekyll and hosted on Github Pages.

Design based on @mdo’s Hyde theme for Jekyll, incorporating some designs from Alexandre Vicenzi’s Flex theme for Pelican, along with other modifications.

Resume built with LaTeX using a modified version of the Friggeri Resume/CV template originally created by Adrien Friggeri.
